((Hypertension[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab] OR "arterial hypertension"[tiab]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR biofeedback*[tiab] OR "bio-feedback"[tiab] OR "HRV biofeedback"[tiab] OR "heart rate variability biofeedback"[tiab] OR "cardiac coherence"[tiab] OR "biofeedback-assisted breathing"[tiab] OR "resonant frequency breathing"[tiab] OR "resonance frequency breathing"[tiab] OR ("Heart Rate Variability"[Mesh] AND biofeedback*[tiab])) AND ("Blood Pressure"[Mesh] OR "blood pressure"[tiab] OR "systolic blood pressure"[tiab] OR "diastolic blood pressure"[tiab] OR SBP[tiab] OR DBP[tiab] OR "ambulatory blood pressure"[tiab] OR ABPM[tiab] OR "24-hour blood pressure"[tiab] OR "blood pressure reduction"[tiab] OR "blood pressure lowering"[tiab] OR "blood pressure control"[tiab]))

(((Hypertension[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh] OR biofeedback*[tiab] OR "HRV biofeedback"[tiab] OR "heart rate variability biofeedback"[tiab] OR "cardiac coherence"[tiab] OR neurofeedback[tiab] OR ("Heart Rate Variability"[Mesh] AND biofeedback*[tiab])) AND (Randomized Controlled Trial[Publication Type] OR Controlled Clinical Trial[Publication Type] OR Clinical Trial[Publication Type] OR random*[tiab] OR randomly[tiab] OR trial[tiab] OR placebo[tiab] OR sham[tiab] OR "crossover"[tiab] OR "cross-over"[tiab] OR "double blind"[tiab] OR "single blind"[tiab] OR control*[tiab] OR "usual care"[tiab] OR "standard care"[tiab] OR "treatment as usual"[tiab] OR waitlist[tiab] OR "no intervention"[tiab]))) NOT (animals[MeSH Terms] NOT humans[MeSH Terms])

((Hypertension[Mesh] OR hypertens*[tiab] OR "high blood pressure"[tiab]) AND (("Heart Rate Variability"[Mesh] OR "heart rate variability"[tiab] OR HRV[tiab]) AND (biofeedback*[tiab] OR "bio-feedback"[tiab] OR "coherence training"[tiab] OR "cardiac coherence"[tiab] OR "heart coherence"[tiab] OR "resonant frequency breathing"[tiab] OR "resonance frequency breathing"[tiab] OR "RSA biofeedback"[tiab] OR "biofeedback-assisted breathing"[tiab])) AND ("Blood Pressure"[Mesh] OR "blood pressure"[tiab] OR SBP[tiab] OR DBP[tiab] OR "systolic blood pressure"[tiab] OR "diastolic blood pressure"[tiab]))

((("Hypertension/therapy"[Mesh] OR "Hypertension/rehabilitation"[Mesh]) AND ("Biofeedback, Psychology/therapy"[Mesh] OR "Biofeedback, Psychology/methods"[Mesh] OR (("Heart Rate Variability"[Mesh] OR "Heart Rate/physiology"[Mesh]) AND "Biofeedback, Psychology"[Mesh])) AND "Blood Pressure"[Mesh])) NOT (animals[MeSH Terms] NOT humans[MeSH Terms])

inclusion_criteria: Randomized controlled trials or other controlled clinical trials with a comparator group (e.g., usual care, sham, waitlist, or no biofeedback).
Adults (>=18 years) diagnosed with hypertension (as defined by study) or with extractable hypertensive subgroup data.
Biofeedback as the primary intervention (e.g., HRV biofeedback, respiratory/respiratory sinus arrhythmia feedback, EMG biofeedback, neurofeedback); co-interventions allowed if matched across arms.
Reports quantitative systolic and/or diastolic blood pressure outcomes (or sufficient data to derive changes).
exclusion_criteria: No control/comparator group (e.g., single-arm pre–post, case series), or non-original research (reviews, editorials, qualitative-only).

Populations without diagnosed hypertension, exclusively pediatric (<18 years), pregnancy-related hypertension, or secondary/acute post-cardiovascular event populations without separable hypertensive data.

Interventions without a biofeedback component (e.g., education only, BP self-monitoring without feedback, meditation/breathing exercises without real-time physiological feedback) or where biofeedback is only a minor adjunct to another dominant therapy.
Do not report systolic/diastolic blood pressure outcomes or lack sufficient data to estimate BP change.
screening_criteria.description: Screening layer to identify controlled trials evaluating biofeedback interventions for adults with hypertension, compared against control conditions, reporting systolic/diastolic blood pressure outcomes.

included_articles.title: Blood pressure biofeedback exerts intermediate-term effects on blood pressure and pressure reactivity in individuals with mild hypertension: a randomized controlled study.
Behavioral treatment of essential hypertension: a comparison between cognitive therapy and biofeedback of heart rate.
Evaluation of biofeedback in the treatment of borderline essential hypertension.
A controlled comparison of thermal biofeedback and relaxation training in the treatment of essential hypertension: II. Effects on cardiovascular reactivity.
Device-guided breathing as treatment for hypertension in type 2 diabetes mellitus: a randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial.
The effect of biofeedback-assisted relaxation training on blood pressure and selected biochemical parameters in patients with essential hypertension.
Psychological treatment of essential hypertension: a controlled comparison of meditation and meditation plus biofeedback.
Internet-based biofeedback-assisted relaxation training in the treatment of hypertension: a pilot study.
Placebo-controlled biofeedback blood pressure effect in hypertensive humans.
The effect of home training with direct blood pressure biofeedback of hypertensives: a placebo-controlled study.
Home relaxation techniques for essential hypertension.
Controlled evaluation of thermal biofeedback in treatment of elevated blood pressure in unmedicated mild hypertension.
